# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Azure Key Vault."
      }
    },
    "applicationObjectIds": {
      "type": "array",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of Azure AD Object IDs (GUIDs) for applications or service principals that need 'Get' and 'List' secret permissions. Example: ['application-1-object-id', 'service-principal-2-object-id']"
      },
      "defaultValue": []
    },
    "tenantId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[subscription().tenantId]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure Active Directory tenant ID where the applications/service principals reside."
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "sku": {
          "family": "A",
          "name": "standard"
        },
        "tenantId": "[parameters('tenantId')]",
        "accessPolicies": "[if(empty(parameters('applicationObjectIds')), json('[]'), array(parameters('applicationObjectIds'), (objectId) => json(concat('{ \"objectId\": \"', objectId, '\", \"tenantId\": \"', parameters('tenantId'), '\", \"permissions\": { \"secrets\": [\"get\", \"list\"] }}')))))]",
        "enableSoftDelete": true,
        "softDeleteRetentionInDays": 90,
        "enabledForDeployment": false,
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": false,
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "keyVaultUri": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName')), '2021-11-01').vaultUri]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The URI of the created Azure Key Vault."
      }
    }
  }
}
